description_long: This sculpture is a finely detailed marble bust depicting the head of a young man with short, wavy hair and classical facial features. The face is rendered with a serious, contemplative expression, and the eyes are deeply set beneath a prominent brow. The hair is intricately carved, with individual locks and subtle texture, giving a lifelike appearance. The back of the head is smoothly rounded, with the hair continuing in a naturalistic pattern. The neck is elongated and tapers down to a truncated base, suggesting it was once part of a larger statue or mounted on a pedestal. The surface has a slightly weathered, matte finish, typical of aged marble sculptures.
description: A realistic marble bust of a young man with wavy hair and classical features, finished with a matte, weathered surface.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the detailed facial features, deep-set eyes, and textured hair.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the rounded back of the head and the sculpted hair texture.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the full curvature of the head and the continuity of the hair pattern.
description_view_3: Right profile view emphasizing the side facial structure and the ear, with the hair's texture visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
